title: eschscholzia californica var. ambigua
intro: Eschscholzia californica var. ambigua, also known as the Sierra California poppy or California poppy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the poppy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as pain, anxiety, and insomnia. The plant is rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from digestive issues. Eschscholzia californica var. ambigua can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
